div.span: - Friends Library channel hides peer items - MediaSourceProvider skips peer sources - Channel cache key flips → Jellyfin rebuilds listing

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span: - Channel items reappear - MediaSourceProvider re-injects peer sources - No restart, no manual refresh
